fieldDescription: The percentage bonus to progress points when the Treasure Hunt Package hullmod is built in as an S-mod.
The maximum multiplier that the Treasure Hunt Package hullmod can apply to progress points.
Maximum progress that can be gained per month from recurring factors (colony ruins, sector sprint, etc.). One-time factors (salvaging, scav kills) are not affected.
Minimum progress points gained from destroying a scavenger fleet.
Maximum progress points gained from destroying a scavenger fleet. Scales with fleet hull value.
Multiplier to colony ruin progress when the tech mining industry is present.
Monthly progress points per relay from the Sector Sprint opportunity. Domain-era relays give double.
Multiplier to sector sprint progress when a meddling fleet is active.
Progress points gained from clearing an excavation site.
Minimum progress points from buying scavenger data.
Maximum progress points from buying scavenger data. Scales with fleet FP.
When enabled, raiding the same market repeatedly gives diminishing progress.
Multiplier applied to raid progress after diminishing returns kick in.
Days for a raided market's progress value to recover to full.
Number of treasure candidates to choose from when you find a lead. Fewer may appear if the pool is small.
Chance of selecting a one-time item (e.g. blueprints) as a treasure reward vs. a repeatable item. Higher values make one-time items more likely.
Whether enforcer faction fleets in the scavenger swarm can stop and inspect the player.
Fuel cost to bombard an excavation site from orbit.
